summary: Comprehensive testing of AIS Data Extractor MVP completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend UI functionality working correctly with MarineTraffic simulation fallback.
passed_tests: All 20 backend API endpoints returning 200 status
Dashboard page loads with stats cards, map, and vessel data
Extract Now button triggers extraction and updates data (141 vessels extracted)
Vessels page shows table with search and filter functionality
Extraction Logs page displays extraction history
Settings page with bot start/stop controls working
Logout functionality redirects to login page
Map renders 129 vessel markers in ASEAN region with color coding
Vessel marker popups display vessel details on click
Search functionality filters vessels by name/MMSI/IMO
Vessel type and flag filters working correctly
MarineTraffic simulation fallback working (MOCKED data source)
